Off Calendar Nov-15-2017 Continued To Nov-29-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Oct-27-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Peter Bresler for (petitioner) Choi Tang Chu Leung.

The Court stated that there is an problem in that the notice was mailed prior to the petition being filed. Mr. Bresler suggested that they waive notice, that the petitioner is the unanimous choice of the family and that they have all waived bond. The Court stated that it is inclined to grant the petition as it is clear that actual notice was given. The Court granted the petition for Letters of Administration (subject to review of the order).

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Rosado. (Not Reported)

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Sep-27-2016 Continued To Oct-25-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
